telemetry.notes: Change model_dir if you place a new trained XGBoost telemetry model folder under app/.

vision.notes: If you replace DINOv2, update dinov2_local_dir. If you recalibrate normal images, replace normal_patch_memory_file.

llm.notes: Set hf_model to a local folder like backend/hf_models/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct after downloading. Keep allow_model_download false unless you want runtime downloads.

rag.notes: RAG indexes live here. Usually you do not need to edit this.
